group: Enterprise Cloud Data and AI Customers

customers.name: Enterprise Data and AI Leader
customers.description: Owns the modernization of enterprise analytics and AI adoption while managing trust, governance, cost, and business value across many domains.
careAbout: Consolidating data estates without disrupting critical reporting
Moving AI pilots into governed production
Showing measurable business value from cloud data and AI spend
winsThem: One governed platform for data, AI, analytics, and collaboration
Clear controls for regulated data and model usage
Cost transparency tied to business domains and workloads
theirFear: AI initiatives remain demos because governance and operations are not ready
Cloud consumption grows faster than measurable value

jobsToBeDone.name: Consolidate data and AI on a governed cloud platform
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Move fragmented warehouses, lakes, and BI pipelines onto a governed platform that supports analytics, ML, and AI applications.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: Trusted data products and AI workloads scale across domains with fewer duplicated platforms.

steps.description: Discover and prepare the work needed to consolidate data and ai on a governed cloud platform with clear ownership and measurable progress.

customerJourneyStories.name: Enterprise Data and AI Leader adoption journey
customerJourneyStories.summary: A realistic adoption journey from executive trigger through governed production expansion.

stages.narrative: Strategic demand for AI and data modernization exceeds the capacity of fragmented platforms.
The team compares hyperscaler and specialist platforms against governance, cost, data gravity, and ecosystem requirements.
Initial workloads move through migration, security review, and production readiness gates.
The platform expands through reusable data products, AI services, operating dashboards, and success playbooks.

top.name: Governed data product adoption
top.description: Reach 82 % of priority data products used by at least two consuming teams for the selected customer segment.
top.unit: % of priority data products used by at least two consuming teams

children.name: Time to first production workload
children.description: Reduce median time from workspace access to first governed production workload.

children.name: Self-service completion rate
children.description: Increase the share of setup and deployment tasks completed without ticket escalation.

children.name: Policy-compliant workload rate
children.description: Increase workloads passing automated policy, lineage, and access checks.

children.name: Sev1 and sev2 incident rate
children.description: Reduce high-severity incidents per 100 production workloads.

top.name: AI production workload expansion
top.description: Reach 120 number of governed production AI workloads for the selected customer segment.
top.unit: number of governed production AI workloads

productStrategy.vision: Make cloud data and AI adoption production-ready by combining self-service speed with governance, operational trust, and cost accountability.

customers.name: AI Application Builder
customers.description: A product engineering or applied-AI leader building model-powered workflows, assistants, and agents on top of enterprise data.
careAbout: Fast access to approved models, tools, and data
Low-latency serving and reliable evaluation loops
Reducing friction between prototype, approval, and production
winsThem: Self-service model and agent tooling with built-in governance
Reusable retrieval, vector, feature, and evaluation services
Clear deployment path with observability and rollback
theirFear: Model access is blocked by procurement or security review
Prompts and agents regress silently after launch
Inference cost makes successful products hard to scale

jobsToBeDone.name: Build AI applications on trusted enterprise data
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Create assistants, copilots, and workflow agents that retrieve from approved data and operate through approved tools.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: AI features answer accurately, respect policy, and integrate with business workflows.

customers.name: Cloud Platform and FinOps Operator
customers.description: A platform, SRE, security, or FinOps leader accountable for reliable, secure, and economically efficient cloud data and AI operations.
careAbout: Reliable workspaces, networking, identity, and accelerator capacity
Transparent cost allocation and optimization recommendations
Audit-ready evidence for security, privacy, and resilience
winsThem: Standardized account provisioning and private connectivity
Usage telemetry tied to budgets, owners, and workloads
Security posture and incident response integrated into platform workflows
theirFear: Audit evidence is scattered across tools

jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Provision capacity, monitor workload health, and optimize unit economics across warehouse, training, and inference usage.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: AI and data workloads grow without surprise cost or reliability degradation.
